title: Github Copilot Error - "Unable to resolve model with family selection: gpt-4" in Github Copilot
author: Paras Elixir 3
text:
I was getting error in Github copilot, without making any changes
"Unable to resolve model with family selection: gpt-4"
I was getting error in Github copilot, without making any changes
"Unable to resolve model with family selection: gpt-4"
To fix it , try adding this settings in VSCode
"github.copilot.advanced": {
"debug.useNodeFetcher": true,
"debug.useElectronFetcher": true
}
}
Restart the editor after updating this setting.
Preferences
>Open User Settings (JSON)
and it worked.Open ctrl+shift+p
And type preferneces:open json settings
Add the code
"github.copilot.advanced": {
"debug.useNodeFetcher": true,
"debug.useElectronFetcher": true
}
And then restart the vscode
Now you can chat with github copilot
